testsuite.name: DecoderTest
testsuite.system-out:

Input: --- Expected: o Found: ? Input: .--. Expected: p Found: Yipes! Can't decode Morse string! Input: --.- Expected: q Found: ? Input: .-. Expected: r Found: r Input: ... Expected: s Found: s Input: ..- Expected: u Found: u Input: ...- Expected: v Found: ? Input: .-- Expected: w Found: ? Input: -..- Expected: x Found: ? Input: -.-- Expected: y Found: Yipes! Can't decode Morse string! Input: --.. Expected: z Found: ?
